2356340.name: Government X
2356340.description:
Welcome to Government X, the ultimate post-apocalyptic survival game. Set in a world ravaged by a global disaster, Government X challenges players to navigate an unforgiving wasteland filled with danger, scarcity, and hostile survivors. With no government to turn to, it's up to you to forge your own path to survival using only your wits, skills, and improvised tools. Explore vast territories, scavenge for resources, and build your own base of operations to weather the challenges that lie ahead. Are you ready to face the end of the world and carve out your own place in the new order? Play Government X today and find out.




In this post-apocalyptic world, you play as a survivor who has been starting in a Government Underground Facility assigned to Sectors for only the most worthy people who managed to reach safety before the world ended. However, the basic living supplies in the bunker are running low, and the community has decided to start emerging from the underground and begin rebuilding the world.

As you step out into the harsh, unforgiving environment, you realize that there is no established government to guide and protect the survivors. You must navigate the dangers of this new world, including hostile groups of other survivors and the treacherous conditions of the environment itself.

Your journey will take you through abandoned cities, dangerous wilderness areas, and treacherous terrain. You'll have to scavenge for supplies, craft weapons and tools, and make alliances with other survivors to stay alive. Along the way, you'll encounter a range of challenges, from natural disasters to dangerous wildlife to hostile factions vying for power and resources.

As you explore the new world and fight for survival, you'll uncover clues about what caused the end of the old world and what the future might hold for humanity. Will you be able to rise above the chaos and rebuild a better world for yourself and your fellow survivors, or will you succumb to the dangers and fail to survive in this new, unforgiving world? The fate of humanity is in your hands in this gripping post-apocalyptic adventure.


Territories are a crucial part of survival in this post-apocalyptic world. When you emerge from the Government Underground Facility, you must stake your claim on the land and establish a base of operations to protect yourself and your fellow survivors.

To create a Territory, you must first place a flag in the desired area. This will mark the territory as your own, allowing you to build structures, set up defenses, and establish a market for supply and demand. Inside your territory, you will have access to a variety of resources and tools, including AI units that can be assigned for protection or production.

However, be warned that Territories can be taken over or destroyed by other survivors who are also vying for control of the land. You must defend your territory from raiders and other hostile groups if you hope to survive and thrive in this dangerous new world.

Your success in this game will depend on your ability to build and maintain a powerful, well-defended Territory while navigating the complex web of alliances, rivalries, and dangers that exist in the post-apocalyptic landscape.


In this post-apocalyptic world, survival is not just about individual strength and skill - it's also about the alliances you form with others. That's why we've included a powerful Clan system in the game, allowing you to band together with other survivors for mutual support and protection.

To join or create a Clan, you will need a Pear phone or laptop - these devices are crucial for staying connected with your fellow Clan members and coordinating your efforts. Once you have established your Clan, you can work together to gather resources, build structures, and defend your Territory from rival Clans and hostile groups of survivors.

Mapping is also a crucial part of survival in this game. As you explore the post-apocalyptic landscape, you'll find Maps scattered throughout the environment - and you can also search for them to expand your knowledge of the world. With a GPS device, you can use these Maps to navigate the wilderness, find valuable resources, and even engage in Geocatching activities for fun and profit.

In addition to the main Map, you'll also have access to Mini Maps that can be assigned to your GPS device for personal use. These will help you stay oriented and track your progress as you journey through the world.

Whether you're forging alliances with other survivors or venturing out into the wilderness to explore and gather resources, the Clan system and mapping tools in this game will be essential to your success. So gather your friends, grab your devices, and get ready to navigate the dangers and challenges of this exciting, immersive post-apocalyptic world.


In this post-apocalyptic world, the scarcity of resources means that trade is essential for survival - and that's where Traders come in. These valuable NPCs can be found in Territories throughout the game, as well as in special zones designated by the developers and server owners.

When you encounter a Trader, you'll have the opportunity to engage in a Barter System, trading valuable resources and items for the goods and supplies that you need. However, be warned that Traders are always looking to make a profit - so you'll need to be savvy and strategic if you want to get the best deals.

On official servers, the Trader system is designed to promote a realistic and immersive trading experience. This means that you can only buy items that have already been sold by other players - so if you want to get the best deals, you'll need to start looting and gathering resources as soon as you emerge from the Government Underground Facility.

With a range of different Traders to discover and negotiate with, and a dynamic, player-driven economy to navigate, the trading system in this game offers a thrilling and immersive experience for players who are looking for a unique and challenging post-apocalyptic adventure. So get ready to start wheeling and dealing, and see if you have what it takes to survive and thrive in this dangerous new world.


In a world where the basic necessities of life are in short supply, surviving means mastering the art of gathering, hunting, and scavenging for food, water, and power. In this game, you'll need to be resourceful and adaptive, using the natural environment to your advantage whenever possible.

Food is essential to your survival, and you'll need to gather it from a variety of sources. Whether you're hunting wild game, fishing in rivers and lakes, or foraging for edible plants and berries, you'll need to be constantly on the lookout for sources of sustenance. And be warned - not all food is safe to eat, so you'll need to use your wits and knowledge to avoid contaminated or poisonous foods.

Water is another vital resource, and you'll need to find and purify it to ensure your survival. Rivers, lakes, and rain collectors can all provide sources of water, but be careful - not all water is safe to drink, and you'll need to be constantly on the lookout for signs of contamination or pollution.

Finally, power is crucial for many aspects of survival, from cooking food to powering electronic devices. In this game, you'll be able to generate electricity using a variety of methods, including water mills, left-behind generators, and other natural sources. But be warned - generating power can be a dangerous and complex process, and you'll need to be constantly vigilant to avoid accidents and ensure your safety.


Coming in a future update, Government X will introduce a robust character customization system, allowing players to create unique avatars and express their individuality in the post-apocalyptic wasteland. From choosing your character's appearance to selecting their skills and abilities, you'll have full control over your survivor's development and progression. Whether you prefer a stealthy, agile build or a heavily armored tank, the choice is yours. Stay tuned for more information on this exciting feature!

As you emerge from the Government Underground Facility and begin to explore the dangerous and unpredictable world outside, you'll face countless challenges and obstacles - but with determination, skill, and a little bit of luck, you just might be able to survive and thrive in this harsh new reality.

Throughout your journey, you'll encounter a wide range of allies and enemies, from fellow survivors to dangerous raiders and mutated creatures. You'll need to use all of your wits and resources to stay alive, scavenging for food, water, and supplies, building shelters and fortifications, and defending yourself against any threats that come your way.

And as you explore deeper into the world, you'll uncover hidden secrets and dark truths about the mysterious Government X and the events that led to the end of the world as we knew it. Will you be able to uncover the truth and find a way to rebuild a new world, or will you fall victim to the dangers that lurk around every corner?

With an immersive storyline, challenging gameplay, and endless opportunities for exploration and adventure, this game offers a thrilling and unforgettable post-apocalyptic experience. So join the adventure today, and see if you have what it takes to survive in a world without rules, without order, and without mercy.

And if you're interested in joining our team or have suggestions for future updates and improvements, we'd love to hear from you! Contact us on Discord to join the conversation and be a part of the community that's shaping the future of this exciting new game.


Government X features an open-ended, sandbox-style gameplay experience with no set endgame content. Instead, players can continue to explore, gather resources, and build their own settlements indefinitely, always facing new challenges and dangers in a dynamic, ever-changing post-apocalyptic world. With the freedom to choose their own objectives and play styles, players can carve out their own unique path to survival, crafting and customizing their gear, forming alliances with other players, or engaging in thrilling PvP combat. Whether you're a lone wolf or a skilled strategist, the possibilities are endless in Government X.
